rag_rules: Fix unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts by tracing root causes and removing invalid clauses rather than adding architecture.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference only visible AADL features or declared helpers; invalid references should be removed.
Component type contracts should use valid variables or outputs for port references, not subcomponent ports.
Validator diagnostics indicating type errors should be resolved by addressing the first unresolved identifier on the same line.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex clauses must be placed in valid component scopes; type expressions must resolve to valid AADL features or helpers.
When a validator reports an error about a named thing having no type, check for unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE type errors; instead, fix or remove invalid clauses.
